title: Kanbus clock demo: REPL plus recursive project/events watcher

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting implementation from accepted plan: new demos/kanbus_clock.py (REPL + recursive events watcher), startup folder/timestamp report, auto-info queue bridge, README update, and tests.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented demos/kanbus_clock.py with recursive project/events discovery, startup latest-timestamp report, async polling+rescan watcher, auto-info queue bridge, and concurrent REPL commands. Added tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (8 tests) and updated demos/README.md. Targeted tests passing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed discovery reliability/performance: replaced Path.rglob-based event-dir scan with pruned os.walk, and moved startup scan/report before device connect so folder results always print immediately even if device connection fails/locks.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Crash triage: user hit PermissionError in demos/kanbus_clock.py when readline.read_history_file cannot access ~/.pypixoo/kanbus_clock_history. Implementing graceful disable path and adding regression test so startup continues.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Patched history setup to treat read/write permission errors as non-fatal (history disabled with log), and added regression test test_setup_readline_history_permission_error_is_non_fatal. Validation: python -m py_compile demos/kanbus_clock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (9 passed).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: User validated watcher flow on-device. Implementing UX tweak: move event action/type into alert header and reformat state transitions to avoid single-line from->to overflow in body.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented watcher notice format update: event action now rendered in header; state transitions split into FROM/TO lines to avoid horizontal overflow. Added test updates; tests passing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing comment notice formatting tweak: COMMENT header + issue id + wrapped comment text (max visible lines), falling back to author only when no comment text exists.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Updated comment-added event rendering: header fixed to COMMENT, body line 1 is short issue ID, remaining lines render wrapped comment text (up to visible limits). Fallback to BY <author> only when comment text missing. tests/test_kanbus_clock.py updated; 9 passing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Bug fix: comment body not shown reliably because payload key varied. Updating parser to extract comment text from nested payload structures via key-priority + fallback string scan.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed missing COMMENT body text: if event payload lacks a substantial comment string, kanbus_clock now falls back to  and renders the latest issue comment text. Added regression test. Validation: tests/test_kanbus_clock.py = 11 passed.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed missing COMMENT body text: when event payload lacks substantial comment content, kanbus_clock now falls back to running kbs show ISSUE_ID --json and renders the latest issue comment text. Added regression test; tests/test_kanbus_clock.py now 11 passed.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing repo-local lookup fix: derive repo root from each event path (.../project/events/*.json) and run fallback kbs show with cwd set to that repo root so cross-repo comment bodies resolve.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented repo-local fallback lookup for comment bodies.  now derives repo root from event path, and  runs  with cwd set to that repo. Added tests for repo-root derivation and cwd propagation. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (12 passed). Triggered live cross-repo comment event in Korporus issue 95e8d2 for manual display verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented repo-local fallback lookup for comment bodies. load_kanbus_event now derives repo root from event path, and fetch_latest_issue_comment_text runs kbs show with cwd set to that repo. Added tests for repo-root derivation and cwd propagation. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (12 passed). Triggered live cross-repo comment event in Korporus issue 95e8d2 for manual display verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Tight-wrap fix requested: comment/info body overflowed horizontally on device. Implementing stricter line wrapping in kanbus_clock and validating with tests before restart retest.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented tighter body wrapping: switched from character-count wrapping to pixel-width wrapping using canonical font measurement (tiny5), with trimming/ellipsis and tests. Validation: tests/test_kanbus_clock.py now 13 passed. Triggered fresh Korporus comment event for visual verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: kanbus_clock now resolves comment bodies across repos by running kbs show in the event repo root (derived from <repo>/project/events path). COMMENT cards render action in header and use tighter pixel-width wrapping to prevent horizontal overflow. Validated with live device confirmation and tests (tests/test_kanbus_clock.py passing).
